detectors.description:
Reentrancy in X._transfer(address,address,uint256) (X.sol#1841-2055):
	External calls:
	- swapBack() (X.sol#1973)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForTokensSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,treasuryWallet,block.timestamp) (X.sol#2077-2089)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- super._transfer(from,address(this),fees) (X.sol#2035)
		- _balances[sender] = senderBalance - amount (X.sol#767)
		- _balances[recipient] += amount (X.sol#771)
	ERC20._balances (X.sol#453) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ERC20._mint(address,uint256) (X.sol#803-823)
	- ERC20._transfer(address,address,uint256) (X.sol#741-781)
	- ERC20.balanceOf(address) (X.sol#583-587)
	- super._transfer(address(this),uniswapV2Pair,tokensForLiquidity) (X.sol#2041)
		- _balances[sender] = senderBalance - amount (X.sol#767)
		- _balances[recipient] += amount (X.sol#771)
	ERC20._balances (X.sol#453) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ERC20._mint(address,uint256) (X.sol#803-823)
	- ERC20._transfer(address,address,uint256) (X.sol#741-781)
	- ERC20.balanceOf(address) (X.sol#583-587)
	- super._transfer(from,to,amount) (X.sol#2053)
		- _balances[sender] = senderBalance - amount (X.sol#767)
		- _balances[recipient] += amount (X.sol#771)
	ERC20._balances (X.sol#453) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ERC20._mint(address,uint256) (X.sol#803-823)
	- ERC20._transfer(address,address,uint256) (X.sol#741-781)
	- ERC20.balanceOf(address) (X.sol#583-587)
	- swapping = false (X.sol#1977)
	X.swapping (X.sol#1463) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- X._transfer(address,address,uint256) (X.sol#1841-2055)

	- [ERC20.balanceOf(address)](X.sol#L583-L587)
	- [super._transfer(address(this),uniswapV2Pair,tokensForLiquidity)](X.sol#L2041)
		- [_balances[sender] = senderBalance - amount](X.sol#L767)
		- [_balances[recipient] += amount](X.sol#L771)
	[ERC20._balances](X.sol#L453) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [ERC20._mint(address,uint256)](X.sol#L803-L823)
	- [ERC20._transfer(address,address,uint256)](X.sol#L741-L781)
	- [ERC20.balanceOf(address)](X.sol#L583-L587)
	- [super._transfer(from,to,amount)](X.sol#L2053)
		- [_balances[sender] = senderBalance - amount](X.sol#L767)
		- [_balances[recipient] += amount](X.sol#L771)
	[ERC20._balances](X.sol#L453) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [ERC20._mint(address,uint256)](X.sol#L803-L823)
	- [ERC20._transfer(address,address,uint256)](X.sol#L741-L781)
	- [ERC20.balanceOf(address)](X.sol#L583-L587)
